title: My Profile
settingsDescription: Manage your profile details, contact information, and preferences.
uploadDescription: Upload a high-quality photo to build trust with other users. Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF. Max 5MB.
bioPlaceholder: Tell buyers a bit about yourself, your shop policies, or what you sell...
updateSuccessDesc: Your changes have been saved to your public profile.
favoritesDescription: Collection of items you're keeping an eye on.
noFavoritesDesc: You haven't saved any listings yet. Browse the marketplace and click the heart icon to save items you love.
savedSearchesDescription: Get notified when new listings match your criteria.
noSavedSearchesDesc: Save a search to get notified when new listings match your criteria.
deleteSearchConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this saved search? This action cannot be undone.
security.description: Manage your password and authentication methods to protect your account.
notifications.description: Choose how you want to be notified about updates and messages.
